title: stachys fruticulosa var. macrocheilos
intro: Stachys fruticulosa var. macrocheilos, also known as the Chinese artichoke or Chinese hedgehog, is a type of perennial herb that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Stachys fruticulosa var. macrocheilos include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, as well as potentially alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, the plant's tubers are typically dried and used to make tea, capsules, or powder, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
